GB 30255一2019
Foreword
Standardization Administration of China is in charge of this English translation. In case of any doubt
about the contents of English translation ，the Chinese original shall be considered authoritative.
This standard is drafted in accordance with the rules given in the GB/T 1.1一2009 Directives for
standardization一Part 1: Structure and drafting of standards .
This standard is mandatory.
This standard replaces GB 30255一2013 Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy
efficiency grades of non-directional sefballasteq LED-lamps for general Jighting services ，anad im-
tegrates the content related to non-directional selfballasted LED Iamps therein.
The following significant technical changes have been made with respect to the GB 30255一2013 :
一lt is clarified in the scope that"This standard is not applicable to the LED products for indoor light-
ing with additional non-lighting related power-consuming functions or with dimmableycolor tunable
function.”;
一The values of Iuminous efficacy for non-directional self-ballasted LED lamps of each grade have
been revised (See 4.1.4);
一The technical requirements for Ilumen maintenance have been revised (See 4.4) ;
一The test methods of correlated color temperature，color rendering index and Ilumen maintenance
have been added (See 5.3).
This standard was proposed and prepared by Standardization Administration of China.
This previous edition of this standard is as follows:
一GB 30255一2013.
T
